description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a green lawn and enclosed by a wooden privacy fence. The house features a driveway leading to a double garage at the front, with a paved walkway and two trash bins near the curb. The roof is flat and light-colored, and the exterior walls are painted in a neutral tone. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes two mature trees and some shrubbery in the front yard, enhancing its residential curb appeal.
description: A single-story suburban house with a flat roof, double garage, fenced yard, and mature trees in the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, main entry, trash bins, and two trees in the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the wooden fence, and the arrangement of windows along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, back wall with fewer windows, and the continuation of the wooden fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage side wall, more of the backyard, and the fence enclosing the property.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, directly accessible from the driveway, and minimal decorative elements.
